name: Poker Room
blurb: Red Dead-style Texas Hold'em. Sit at the 6-seat table; AI beings take seats, each with its own minted rappid and every action signed. Commit-reveal deck, play-chips.
how_to_play: Walk into the poker room and sit. AI bots fill empty seats. Each hand: dealer commits to a shuffled deck (SHA-256 commit-reveal), posts blinds, deals holes, runs pre-flop/flop/turn/river betting, then showdown. Every post/check/bet/call/raise/fold/deal/reveal is a signed rapp-poker-action/1.0 record, signed with the seat's OWN rappid (bot or player), never a human.
note: Engine is pure-stdlib and importable server-side; the browser room mirrors its action shape + hand ranking byte-for-byte so a hand played in-world replays/verifies here.
